description_en: A Japanese red pine (akamatsu) at Fukami, designated as a natural monument in the monuments category. It is town-designated by Itayanagi, located at Fukamiya 4, Fukami, Itayanagi. The designation was made on 2004-07-21.

name_romaji: Komonjo (Itayanogi Nakayashiki narabi ni Tsutsumi no Manisū, Dō Teraya shiki Miyachi Kakitsuke Hikae no Chō hoka Kyūten)
name_en: Old Documents (ten items including a register of the Itayanogi Nakayashiki and embankment measurements)
description_en: A set of ten old documents, including a register of the Itayanogi Nakayashiki and embankment measurements together with related temple-land and shrine-land memoranda, classified as old documents within the tangible cultural properties category. It is town-designated by Itayanagi. The designation was made on 2007-07-05.
